title: Three boys and two men charged over rape of teenage girl in Kent
summary_full: Four accused of rape and one of aiding and abetting rape in connection with incident in GravesendThree boys and two men have been charged over the rape of a teenage girl in Kent, police said.Kent police received reports on Tuesday that a girl had been raped at a private property in Gravesend between 25 March and 19 April.
